arts.ttl: 'We're not stupid' - Liam Manning makes honest Bristol City confession ahead of Watford clash
arts.sum: Liam Manning has confessed that Bristol City know their next two games against Watford and West Brom will be important in the Reds' play-off push this term, insisting he, his coaching staff and players are "not stupid." On paper, City's run-in until the end of the season is more challenging than that ahead of the teams in and around them in the Championship table with games against the likes of Sunderland and Leeds United still to come as well as this week's matches against Watford and the Baggies.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning sets Rob Dickie challenge for Bristol City run-in after return to 'excellent' level
arts.sum: Liam Manning has challenged Rob Dickie to maintain his "excellent" level for the remainder of the season after admitting the Bristol City vice-captain suffered a slight "drop off" following his injury earlier this season. Liam Manning sets Rob Dickie challenge for Bristol City run-in after return to 'excellent' level

arts.ttl: Tom Cleverley shares Liam Manning and Bristol City verdict ahead of Watford's Ashton Gate visit
arts.sum: Tom Cleverley has labelled Bristol City boss Liam Manning a "very good coach" ahead of Watford's trip to Ashton Gate this weekend, admitting his side's clash with the Robins will be "very significant" in both team's season. Although a win wouldn't be enough to see Watford climb back into the play-off places this weekend, a defeat at Ashton Gate would stretch the gap to the Reds to seven points and, in turn, massively dent the Hornets' promotion hopes .

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes Elijah Morrison admission after recent Bristol City Under-21s absences
arts.sum: Liam Manning admits Bristol City "need" Elijah Morrison in their first-team squad currently, insisting he has "no doubts" the young defender will feature whilst discussing his absence from Under-21s fixtures in recent weeks. The left-back has missed the Young Robins' last seven matches, including Tuesday afternoon's 4-2 win over Hull City, instead tending to travel and train with Manning's first team.

arts.ttl: Championship supercomputer predicts Bristol City and play-off rivals' fate and final table
arts.sum: The Robins are expected to win all of their final four home matches against Watford, West Brom, Sunderland and Preston North End but lose each of their three remaining games on the road against QPR, Luton Town and Leeds United . Michael Carrick's side are expected to pick up just six points from their final seven games, winning twice at the Riverside Stadium (where they still have to face Leeds United, Plymouth Argyle and Norwich City) and losing their other five matches.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning explains Cam Pring and Haydon Roberts call ahead of Bristol City's clash vs Watford
arts.sum: Liam Manning has explained his decision to start Haydon Roberts in a more advanced position ahead of Cam Pring in recent weeks, admitting Bristol City's limited options on the right of defence have played a part in the Robins' current shape. Haydon Roberts has started in a more advanced position than Cam Pring in each of Bristol City's last two matches

arts.ttl: Bristol City confirm new date for Elland Road trip as Leeds United game selected for TV coverage
arts.sum: The Elland Road meeting between the two sides was originally scheduled to be played at 3:00pm on Saturday, April 26 but with the Robins well in the play-off mix and Daniel Farke's side chasing automatic promotion to the Premier League, Sky will broadcast the game on Sky Sports Football. Bristol City's away clash with Leeds United later this month has been selected for broadcast by Sky Sports but as a result, will now kick-off at 8:00pm on Monday, April 28.

arts.ttl: Bristol City handed four-figure fine by FA after 'mass confrontation' in Sheffield United draw
arts.sum: Both the Reds and the Blades were charged after it was alleged the two clubs failed to ensure their players did not behave in an "improper and/or provocative way" late on in their draw at Bramall Lane. Bristol City have been handed a four-figure fine by the FA after they were charged following a "mass confrontation" in the Robins' 1-1 draw with Sheffield United last month.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd fined £120,000 for Bristol City brawl
arts.sum: Sheffield United are fined £120,000 following a melee against Bristol City in March.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning shares latest on Ayman Benarous almost three years on from last Bristol City outing
arts.sum: Liam Manning has provided an update on Ayman Benarous' recovery, insisting Bristol City will do everything they can to "look after" the midfielder almost three years on from his last competitive first-team appearance. Ayman Benarous hasn't played for the Bristol City first team since April 2022 having suffered successive ACL injuries
